  "findings": [
    "Sheave misalignment detected using a straightedge during the staged inspection phase."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Adjust the axial position of the sheaves on the shafts and realign using the straightedge or a laser alignment tool until flush.",
    "Verify alignment meets manufacturer specifications before tensioning and installing the belts."
  ],
  "rationale": "The sheave misalignment must be corrected before the belts are tensioned and the system is run. Operating with misaligned sheaves causes rapid belt wear, uneven groove wear, and premature bearing failure.",

    "mfr guides"
  ]
